name: Diff scan returns Trust Score and findings for cheating code
description: When a user pastes a diff containing a disabled assertion (e.g. test.skip) into the Scan page and submits, the app returns a Trust Score number between 0-100 and lists at least one finding with an explanation.

planSteps.description: The scan page shows a text area or input area where a git diff can be pasted
Click the Scan or Analyze button to submit the diff
A Trust Score number is displayed in the results area, clearly labelled as a score or percentage
At least one finding is listed in the results, with an explanation mentioning disabled assertion or test.skip
